title: osmanthus venosus
intro: Osmanthus venosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the fragrant olive or venous osmanthus, and is native to China and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Osmanthus venosus lie in its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Osmanthus venosus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. Osmanthus venosus is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, which can be consumed orally or used topically as a skin toner or hair treatment.
